author: lOrm
content: Fixed: added McpError::ResponseIdMismatch{expected,got} variant; HttpTransport::request now compares response.id against request.id and returns the new variant on mismatch. StdioTransport refactored to use the same variant (DRY). 4 new unit tests fix701_* (matching id OK, mismatched numeric id rejected with ResponseIdMismatch, non-numeric id rejected at JSON decode step, stdio mismatch surfaces ResponseIdMismatch). cargo test --lib: 1436 passed = 1432 baseline + 4 new. cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings: exit 0. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
